limitations: No quantified dollar amounts specifically attributed to AI investment were found in the excerpts; AI spend is embedded in broader digital transformation and capex programs without AI-specific figures, capping investment intensity at 3

AI narrative concreteness scored 4 (deployed with operating detail) rather than 5 because no quantified business results (%, $, time saved) are attributed specifically to AI deployments — the 2.2 million outages avoided figure is attributed to smart self-healing technology, not AI explicitly

Risk disclosure scored 4 based on named company-specific risk mechanisms (cybersecurity, data privacy, regulatory, vendor/third-party AI tools, implementation failure) and named governance bodies (ECOG, EST, Audit Committee); no quantified risk exposure found to warrant score 5
